Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Prism]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Prism is a Void Prism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Prism's form is a snake made of yellow sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Prism theorizes that the Aether is attempting to protect itself from an upcoming threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Prism communicates with Lutoch mentally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Prism is a character who can communicate with Lutoch privately via mental voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Prism expressed relief at arriving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Prism is blocking transmissions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Prism projects himself through a wrist console.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
